tasks.title: Immutable base layer and colliders
tasks.goal: Establish the scan .usdc as read-only defaultPrim sublayered at the bottom of the layer stack; define walls/floors as static colliders (UsdPhysicsCollisionAPI) and the workstation as a rigid body (UsdPhysicsRigidBodyAPI); author kilogramsPerUnit and explicit UsdPhysicsMassAPI masses.
tasks.verification_gate: Base layer contains no downstream opinions: all overrides live in upper layers (layer-stack diff proof); explicit masses authored; kilogramsPerUnit set in stage metadata.
tasks.rollback_plan: Rebuild stage.usda; base .usdc is untouched by construction.
tasks.next_action: Mirror the WorldSim doctrine: agent code must never mutate the base scan layer.

tasks.title: Genesis feasibility on validated twin
tasks.goal: Per the Genesis-first decision (RuView ADR-147 defers NVIDIA Cosmos: 32.5 GB VRAM vs 15.5 GB RTX 5080; no Isaac dependency exists): install Genesis from source in a nix-owned Python env, run EGL offscreen headless, and load the validated USD twin scene.
tasks.verification_gate: Headless offscreen render of the twin scene at >30 FPS on the RTX 5080; repeated seeded run is bit-exact deterministic.
tasks.rollback_plan: Remove the Genesis env; twin USD untouched; fall back to Isaac Lab per the Track B roadmap.
tasks.next_action: Confirm driver/CUDA versions first; keep the Isaac Lab fallback documented in the feasibility report.
